positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a celestial owl perched on a crescent moon, radiating soft bioluminescent light. The composition is perfectly centered, utilizing a strong silhouette against a deep indigo and cosmic teal background. Include swirling nebula patterns in lavender and gold leaf accents, treated with thick, graphic linework. The style should evoke Art Nouveau meets modern vector illustration, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Flat composition, high contrast, volumetric lighting emanating from the owl, clean edges, graphic design quality.
negative: artifacts, blurry, low resolution, messy, complex background, photo, photorealistic, gradient smoke, watermark, text, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, fuzzy, grain, copyright
